case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. GERARDO ANTONIO MATUTE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $125.00) SERVED DEC-12-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MATUTE, GERARDO ANTONIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATUTE, GERARDO ANTONIO $1,960.16 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,135.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MATUTE, GERARDO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-06-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-16-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
